title: Reaper's Medieval
description: Medieval Minecraft that is high-quality, for low-end devices.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/462cb9af1fa7da9c402936f87184d3259c0d6bb1.png)
# SUMMARY
**Reaper's Medieval** is a modpack that I created as a medieval modpack for lower-end devices. I have tested the main aspects of the game and all seems to be well, but know that you may experience a few issues here and there while playing.
# MODS
Some main mods that are included in this modpack are:
- 10 Optimization mods, such as "Lithium", "Sodium" and "Clumps"
- Over 20 quality-of-life mods, such as "Presence Footsteps" and "Sounds Physics Remastered"
- Completely overhauled terrain generation with Terralith
- Completely overhauled structures with 9 of Yung's Better Structures mods

P.S: The modpack contains 76 mods (latest version, including support mods and rescoure packs) but can still comfortably be run on any low-end PC.
